title: Intro to React
description: Master the fundamentals of React — components, state, props, and hooks — through bite-sized scrollable lessons.

title: TypeScript Basics
description: Go from JavaScript to TypeScript with confidence. Learn types, interfaces, generics, and real-world patterns.

title: CSS Mastery
description: Level up your CSS skills — flexbox, grid, animations, custom properties, and modern layout patterns.

title: Computer Basics
description: Start from zero. Learn what a computer is, how to use it, browse the web, send emails, and stay safe online.
